message:
The other day, I was frantically searching for my family’s important documents as we prepared for a little weekend getaway. You know how it goes—checking the weather, packing bags, and then the panic sets in when I realize I haven’t seen our emergency go-bag in ages! 

After some digging, I found it tucked away in the closet, and to my surprise, it was full of everything we needed: our IDs, insurance papers, and even a spare phone charger. It felt like a small victory in a sea of chaos! 

That little moment reminded me how important it is to stay organized and keep our essentials in one place. Sometimes, it’s the little wins that can make a big difference in our day-to-day lives. 

Have you had any small wins in your preparedness journey lately?
